message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range and should be in the centre
The restaurant should serve modern european food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 11:00 on monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 08:45 and should go to cambridge
The train should be on the same day as the restaurant booking and should depart from leicester
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
